novel_features.name: Fleet health
novel_features.description: Single-command account-wide health snapshot: mailbox count, oversight queue depth, webhook delivery rate, domain verification status, usage vs plan limits.

novel_features.name: Bulk oversight decide
novel_features.description: Approve or reject all pending emails matching a filter (by mailbox, sender, or age) in one command.

novel_features.name: Oversight velocity
novel_features.description: See approval/rejection rates and median decision latency per mailbox across your entire fleet.

novel_features.name: Trust ladder status
novel_features.description: Fleet-wide view of each mailbox's oversight mode, time-at-level, and upgrade eligibility.

novel_features.name: Trust timeline
novel_features.description: Per-mailbox chronological history of every oversight mode change with timestamps and who triggered it.

novel_features.name: Send and wait
novel_features.description: Send an email and block until a reply arrives or timeout — the agent test loop in one command.

novel_features.name: Allowlist coverage
novel_features.description: See what percentage of recent recipients are covered by allowlist patterns vs gated.

novel_features.name: Inbox health
novel_features.description: Per-mailbox health snapshot: unread count, oldest unread age, reply rate, and thread depth.

novel_features.name: Stale thread detection
novel_features.description: List conversation threads with no reply in N days — surfaces dropped conversations.

novel_features.name: Compliance snapshot
novel_features.description: Cross-entity compliance report: oversight bypass count, approval/rejection counts, decision latency percentiles per mailbox.

novel_features.name: Webhook health
novel_features.description: Per-webhook success rate, failure count, last delivery timestamp, and consecutive failure streak.
